vulnerabilities.fix: Ensure that sensitive data such as error details and request information are not logged. Modify the logger configuration to avoid exposing sensitive data.

vulnerabilities.description: Lack of Middleware for Security Enhancements.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement Helmet middleware and configure CORS with a proper whitelist to enhance security headers and restrict resource sharing respectively.
Integrate rate-limiting middleware to control the number of requests to mitigate brute force and Denial of Service (DoS) attacks.

vulnerabilities.description: Input Sanitization Missing for User Input.
vulnerabilities.fix: Implement input validation and sanitization using libraries such as Joi or express-validator to prevent injection attacks.
